## ChocolateLibrary.getTask() method

Gets a [task](./ts-chocolate.entities.tasks.irawtaskentity.md) by its [composite ID](./ts-chocolate.taskid.md)

**Signature:**

```typescript
getTask(id: TaskId): Result<IRawTaskEntity>;
```
